productIdentity.corePrinciple: Everything stays alive. Feed, tabs, drawer, search, graph and collection lens must preserve spatial continuity.

forbidden: replace homepage with collection-only grid
force collection click to full page takeover
reset feed scroll when opening drawer
turn feed tabs into route navigation
make object cards the only reading entry

allowedSurfaces: /collections/ as index of folder and series lenses
/collections/[slug]/ as generated static reading session for folder and series only
collectionModel.topicCollectionRule: Topic collections are metadata/search/Graph dimensions in the runtime index and must not be batch prerendered into static collection pages.

preferredInteraction.urlBehavior: sync state without forcing full reload

forbidden: collection hero replacing feed
collection card wall inside drawer
card recursion
collection route takeover as primary flow

objectModel.projectionRule: Pages do not define object semantics. Objects define page projections.

BookObject.stableIdentity: metadataId is semantic identity; openlistPath is a file binding and may change when files move

authoritySplit.fileIndex: public-data/books/books-index.json records OpenList path, modified, size, sourceType and cache-facing cover inputs
authoritySplit.metadataLayer: public-data/books/books.metadata.json records editable metadata now and must migrate to Directus or equivalent metadata DB before scaling
authoritySplit.runtimeTruth: apps/admin-next + MySQL owns reader memory, highlights, annotations and relation events
authoritySplit.localStorage: cache, preference or legacy migration only

forbidden: text-only generic book card
books collection rendered as article reading session
disabled generated cover fallback on homepage
raw source prefetch on homepage idle
script-level overlays as book metadata database
books-index.json as editable metadata authority
localStorage book metadata authority

metadataGovernance.rule: Index and metadata are separate. Manifests are projections and caches, not editable truth.
forbidden: const overlays in build scripts
semantic tags/categories hard-coded inside index builders
localStorage becoming a metadata database
OpenList deciding tags, collections, descriptions or status
everything is a card
drawer card wall
admin panel visual language on reader surfaces

regressionGuards.rule: Homepage must render mixed object feed, not only collection cards.
Feed tabs must filter client-side without full page navigation.
Drawer body must prioritize active object content over collection grid.
Collection is contextual lens, not primary page takeover.
